rationale.R1.1: The edits improve clarity and flow but don't fundamentally change the conceptual framing of ClarifyChat.
rationale.RX.1: The agent acknowledges uncertainty by flagging potential overreach in some claims, but doesn't provide specific confidence levels for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The edits stay within the scope of clarifying and polishing the existing text, without introducing new concepts or arguments.
rationale.RX.4: The edits are purely stylistic and do not introduce any new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The agent mentions making some framing changes but doesn't provide specific details about which edits were made and why.
